description_long: This is a classic oxford-style dress shoe featuring a two-tone design with a rich brown upper quarter and a sleek black vamp and toe. The shoe is constructed with a low heel and a smooth, rounded toe, giving it a formal and timeless appearance. The upper material appears to be polished leather, while the sole is likely made of durable rubber or leather. The shoe is fastened with a standard criss-cross lacing system using thin, round laces. The stitching is subtle and precise, contributing to the refined look. The interior is likely lined with a softer material for comfort, and the overall build suggests it is intended for formal or business urban settings.
description: A two-tone oxford dress shoe with a brown upper and black toe, featuring polished leather and standard lacing. The design is formal, sleek, and well-crafted.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown upper quarter, black vamp and toe, and low heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded black toe and the criss-cross lacing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the brown upper and black sole, mirroring the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the brown heel counter and the back seam.
